case_title: SAARMAN CONSTRUCTION LTD. VS ELITE TILE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SAARMAN CONSTRUCTION LTD. AS TO DEFENDANT ELITE TILE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-15-1995 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF JUL-06-1995 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ELITE TILE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAARMAN CONSTRUCTION LTD. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELITE TILE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,055.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT MAIL TO LANCE HOURANY VIC PRES. ELITE TILE RETURNED VACANT.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT ELITE TILE
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 24204, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAARMAN CONSTRUCTION LTD. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ELITE TILE EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS. JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 24204 ON 2-22-96. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
